assumptions: The issue is assessed in consolidated financial statements.
The dividend position gives rise to foreign currency exposure within the scope of IFRS 9 hedge accounting considerations.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as one of the three top-level hedge accounting models for exposures to changes in fair value attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model, including for highly probable forecast transactions and foreign currency risk in qualifying intragroup forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk.
